node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 10 > CN Tower EdgeWalk

node.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
node.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

node.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

node.name: Stakeholder Presentation
node.description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation.
